improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI">
<meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business decisions. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners and traders. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for a B2B audience of business owners and traders. Including the price anchor (US$2/day) and free searches creates urgency and lowers perceived risk. These tags are currently missing or generic, leaving social shares and search snippets underoptimised.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and professional guidance for your business operations. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This copy clearly communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), highlights key features (instant answers, voice chat, professional support), and includes a low-friction CTA mentioning the free trial offer. The headline establishes immediate relevance for the target audience while the subheading builds value and reduces hesitation by emphasizing the risk-free trial.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with annual billing. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common conversion-point question—what happens at the paywall. It reinforces the value of membership, clearly states pricing without inventing details, and highlights the annual savings incentive. Reducing uncertainty at the free-to-paid transition helps increase conversions.
